description: Module change pending — adding Newsletter, removing Booking; setup +£0, monthly +£2

values.chargeOrRefundLine: no money moves (the new module costs the same as the old)
values.monthlyDeltaLine: your subscription goes up by £2/month from next billing cycle

expected.subject: Got your module change — confirming shortly
expected.body:
Hi Alex,

Got your update — here's what's about to change.

What's different:
  • Adding: Newsletter
  • Removing: Online Booking

Money side:
  • Setup: no money moves (the new module costs the same as the old)
  • Monthly subscription: your subscription goes up by £2/month from next billing cycle

Your new totals:
  • Setup fee: £207
  • Monthly: £29/month

I'll process the payment and email you to confirm — usually
within one working day. After that, any new modules show up
on your hub ready to set up.

Heads-up:
  • You only get one module change before launch, so this is
    it. Anything else needs to wait until after you go live.
  • If you're removing a module you'd already set up, I keep
    your data safe in case you change your mind later.

If anything looks wrong above, hit reply and I'll fix it
before processing the payment.

— Ben
